channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Saturday, February 21
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 05:33 AM (1.121 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 11:29 AM (0.258 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: W 13 mph
